description: DESIGN-ONLY STUB (G5 — Notification Templates per workflow state). Reserves the schema code; the property bag and validation rules are intentionally minimal and will be filled in during the implementation PR. The eventual record models a per-(state, channel, locale) outbound notification body with variable substitution tokens such as [SRID], [YEAR], [CITIZEN_NAME]. Consumed at runtime by the Novu bridge to render citizen + officer notifications. See docs/g-phases/g5-notification-templates.md for the full design.

stub.description: Placeholder uniqueness key so the MDMS v2 validator accepts the schema during registration. The implementation PR replaces this with the real (state, channel, locale) tuple.
